title: paranormal activity in Willow Court ghost documentary

australian_relation: ABC public report on public discourse around paranormal activity at the former mental health asylum at New Norfolk.

coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page describes a documentary about paranormal activity at the former mental health asylum at New Norfolk; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Willow Court Historic Site point.
evidence_summary: ABC reported that Tasmania's anti-discrimination commissioner was investigating a documentary about paranormal activity at a former mental health asylum after complaints that it may discriminate against former patients. The public item identifies the New Norfolk asylum context and the paranormal documentary as the subject of the dispute.
